CMAKE_MINIMUM_REQUIRED(VERSION 2.8.12)
 
INCLUDE(ExternalProject)
INCLUDE(ProcessorCount)
 
ProcessorCount(CoreCount)
 
SET(THIRD_PARTY_DIR ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/3rdparty)
SET(THIRD_PARTY_CMAKE_ARGS
        -DCMAKE_C_FLAGS=${CMAKE_C_FLAGS}
        -DCMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELEASE=${CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELEASE}
        -DCMAKE_C_FLAGS_DEBUG=${CMAKE_C_FLAGS_DEBUG}
        -DCMAKE_CXX_FLAGS=${CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS}
        -DCMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELEASE=${CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELEASE}
        -DCMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_DEBUG=${CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_DEBUG}
        -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=${CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE}
        -DCMAKE_INSTALL_LIBDIR=<INSTALL_DIR>/lib
        -DCMAKE_INSTALL_BINDIR=<INSTALL_DIR>/bin
        -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=<INSTALL_DIR>/)
 
message(STATUS "TEST THIRD_PARTY_DIR=${THIRD_PARTY_DIR}")

######################################################################
# Gtest
######################################################################
SET(GTEST_CMAKE_ARGS
  ${THIRD_PARTY_CMAKE_ARGS}
  -DBUILD_SHARED_LIBS=OFF)
 
EXTERNALPROJECT_ADD(gtest
  SOURCE_DIR ${THIRD_PARTY_DIR}/googletest
  CMAKE_ARGS ${GTEST_CMAKE_ARGS}
  DOWNLOAD_COMMAND ""
  LOG_DOWNLOAD On
  LOG_CONFIGURE On
  LOG_BUILD On
  LOG_INSTALL On)
 
EXTERNALPROJECT_GET_PROPERTY(gtest INSTALL_DIR)
SET(GTEST_LIBS_DIR ${INSTALL_DIR}/lib PARENT_SCOPE)
SET(GTEST_INCLUDE_DIR ${INSTALL_DIR}/include PARENT_SCOPE)
 
MACRO(TARGET_GTEST target)
  ADD_DEPENDENCIES(${target} gtest)
  TARGET_INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES(${target} PUBLIC ${GTEST_INCLUDE_DIR})
  TARGET_INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES(${target} PUBLIC ${GTEST_INCLUDE_DIR}/gtest)
  TARGET_LINK_LIBRARIES(${target} -L${GTEST_LIBS_DIR} libgtest.a libgtest_main.a)
ENDMACRO()
 
MACRO(TARGET_GTEST_HEADER_ONLY target)
  ADD_DEPENDENCIES(${target} gtest)
  TARGET_INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES(${target} PUBLIC ${GTEST_INCLUDE_DIR})
  TARGET_INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES(${target} PUBLIC ${GTEST_INCLUDE_DIR}/gtest)
ENDMACRO()

######################################################################
# Mockcpp
######################################################################
SET(MOCKCPP_SRC_DIR ${THIRD_PARTY_DIR}/mockcpp)
SET(MOCKCPP_LIB_DIR ${THIRD_PARTY_DIR}/mockcpp/src PARENT_SCOPE)
EXTERNALPROJECT_ADD(mockcpp
  SOURCE_DIR ${MOCKCPP_SRC_DIR}
  BINARY_DIR ${MOCKCPP_SRC_DIR}
  DOWNLOAD_COMMAND ""
  INSTALL_COMMAND ""
  LOG_DOWNLOAD On
  LOG_CONFIGURE On
  LOG_BUILD On
  LOG_INSTALL On)
 
SET(MOCKCPP_INCLUDE_DIR ${MOCKCPP_SRC_DIR}/include PARENT_SCOPE)
SET(MOCKCPP_3TH_INCLUDE_DIR ${MOCKCPP_SRC_DIR}/3rdparty PARENT_SCOPE)
 
MACRO(TARGET_MOCKCPP target)
  ADD_DEPENDENCIES(${target} mockcpp)
  TARGET_INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES(${target} PUBLIC ${MOCKCPP_INCLUDE_DIR})
  TARGET_INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES(${target} PUBLIC ${MOCKCPP_3TH_INCLUDE_DIR})
  TARGET_LINK_LIBRARIES(${target} -L${MOCKCPP_LIB_DIR} libmockcpp.a)
ENDMACRO()
 
MACRO(TARGET_MOCKCPP_HEADER_ONLY target)
  ADD_DEPENDENCIES(${target} mockcpp)
  TARGET_INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES(${target} PUBLIC ${MOCKCPP_INCLUDE_DIR})
  TARGET_INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES(${target} PUBLIC ${MOCKCPP_3TH_INCLUDE_DIR})
ENDMACRO()
